channel.title: SecurityWizardry Vulnerability Radar (RMFconsultoria)
channel.description: Alertas do SecurityWizardry.com Radar Page - Curado por RMFconsultoria

item.title: RedHat - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 8.1
item.description: Friday 26 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | Red Hat Keycloak: Identity and access management system. Authenticated users can bypass all authorization policies via crafted URL with access-denied path.

item.title: Apache - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 8.2
item.description: Friday 26 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.2 | Apache Shiro provides security for Java applications; shiro-guice module flaw allows authentication bypass via crafted HTTP request.

item.title: Dell Wyse - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.8
item.description: Friday 26 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | Dell Wyse Management Suite manages endpoint devices; this allows remote low-privilege attackers to execute code remotely. More info....

item.title: EVoke - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.4
item.description: Friday 26 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.4 | EVoke CSMS manages electric vehicle charging; WebSocket endpoints lack authentication, allowing attackers to impersonate stations and escalate privileges.

item.title: Rapid7 - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 8.8
item.description: Thursday 25 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Rapid7 InsightConnect Sed Plugin automates security tasks; OS command injection via expression parameter allows arbitrary command execution.

item.title: Google - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 10.0
item.description: Thursday 25 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 10.0 | Google Cloud Gemini CLI manages cloud workflows; improper neutralisation in container launcher allows host-level code execution via crafted files.

item.title: GitLab - Patch - CVSS Score: v3 - 8.7
item.description: Thursday 25 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v3 - 8.7 | GitLab 19.0 <19.0.3: Web-based DevOps platform; flaw lets developer-role users run arbitrary client-side code via un-sanitised input.

item.title: ProFTPD - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.6
item.description: Thursday 25 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.6 | ProFTPD FTP server: Authenticated users bypass Directory ACLs via /proc/self/root in RNFR, enabling unauthorised file renames and access. More info....

item.title: n8n - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.2
item.description: Thursday 25 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.2 | n8n workflow automation tool; SQL injection in MySQL, PostgreSQL, MS SQL nodes allow authenticated users to execute unauthorised database commands.

item.title: Tenable - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 8.7
item.description: Wednesday 24 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | Tenable Identity Exposure manages identity and access; multiple unauthenticated API endpoints expose sensitive config data and credentials to remote attackers.

item.title: Cisco - Exploit - CVSS Score v3 - 8.6
item.description: Wednesday 24 June 2026 | Exploit | CVSS Score v3 - 8.6 | A vulnerability in Cisco Unified Communications Manager (Unified CM) and Cisco Unified Communications Manager Session Management Edition (Unified CM SME) could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to conduct server-side request forgery (SSRF) attacks through an affected device.

item.title: RedHat - Patch - CVSS Score: v3 - 9.6
item.description: Wednesday 24 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v3 - 9.6 | Red Hat Ansible Automation Platform manages IT automation; missing auth in EDA websocket API leaks credentials via forged messages.

item.title: OpenRemote - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.6
item.description: Wednesday 24 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.6 | OpenRemote IoT platform management; IDOR flaw lets authenticated users delete alarms from other tenants by exploiting missing validation in bulk deletion. More info.... The Vulnerability Definitions Explained

item.title: MISP - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 9.3
item.description: Tuesday 23 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | MISP threat intelligence platform; flaw allowed admin to load crafted Kafka config, enabling arbitrary code execution via external libraries.

item.title: Grafana - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.6
item.description: Tuesday 23 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.6 | Grafana Snowflake Datasource connects Grafana to Snowflake data warehouse; allows users to read/write files via GET/PUT commands, risking data exposure.

item.title: IBM - Patch - CVSS Score: v3 - 10.0
item.description: Tuesday 23 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v3 - 10.0 | IBM Langflow OSS is a Python workflow tool; some versions allow unauthenticated code execution via auth bypass.

item.title: Berriai - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.5
item.description: Tuesday 23 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.5 | berriai LiteLLM AI Gateway proxy server; some versions have a vulnerability, but were patched. More info....

item.title: Canonical - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.0
item.description: Tuesday 23 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.0 | Canonical Ubuntu 24.04 LTS manages AD certificate auto-enrolment; some versions use HTTP, allowing MITM attacks and trust store poisoning.

item.title: RedHat - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.8
item.description: Tuesday 23 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Red Hat OpenShift Container Platform manages container orchestration; WMCO flaw allows compromised Windows node to gain cluster-admin rights via CSR abuse.

item.title: Microsoft - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 10.0
item.description: Monday 22 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 10.0 | Microsoft Azure Active Directory manages identity and access; improper authentication allows attackers to elevate privileges remotely.

item.title: JetBrains - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 10.0
item.description: Monday 22 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 10.0 | JetBrains Hub collaboration platform; authentication bypass via direct database access allows administrative access before specified versions.

item.title: Crawl4AI - Patch - CVSS Score: v4 - 9.8
item.description: Monday 22 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v4 - 9.8 | Crawl4AI is a web crawling tool that has an auth bypass via hardcoded JWT key, allowing token forgery and full access.

item.title: IBM - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - Multiple
item.description: Monday 22 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - Multiple | Critical vulnerabilities in third‑party JavaScript components used by IBM Robotic Process Automation can enable XSS, SSRF, DoS, and even RCE. More info.... The Vulnerability Definitions Explained

item.title: Microsoft - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.8
item.description: Friday 19 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | Microsoft 365 Copilot is missing authentication that lets attackers disclose info over network without authorisation.

item.title: Mitsubishi - OT - CVSS Score v4 - 8.7
item.description: Friday 19 June 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | Mitsubishi Electric MELSEC iQ-F FX5-EIP module manages industrial Ethernet/IP connections; integer overflow allows remote DoS via many TCP connections.

item.title: Hitachi - Patch - CVSS Score: v3 - 8.6
item.description: Friday 19 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v3 - 8.6 | Hitachi Virtual Storage Platform is an enterprise storage system that has a DoS vulnerability in its 10G iSCSI interface.

item.title: F5 - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.2
item.description: Friday 19 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.2 | Various F5’s NGINX products are affected by use-after-free flaw in NGINX HTTP/3 that can enable remote DoS or possible code execution. More info.... The Vulnerability Definitions Explained

item.title: Cisco - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 9.1
item.description: Thursday 18 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | Cisco Identity Services Engine manages network access; flaw allows authenticated users to run commands, escalate privileges, and cause DoS.

item.title: Splunk - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.1
item.description: Thursday 18 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | Splunk AI Toolkit 5.7: AI data analysis tool; admin users can run arbitrary OS commands via unsafe shell execution in btool helper.

item.title: Android - Patch - CVSS Score: v4 - 10.0
item.description: Thursday 18 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v4 - 10.0 | Google Android 17 manages phone interfaces; logic error in setAllowedCarriers allows disabling carrier restrictions, enabling local privilege escalation without user action.

item.title: Oracle - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 10.0
item.description: Thursday 18 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 10.0 | Oracle WebLogic Server manages enterprise applications; unauthenticated HTTP access allows full server takeover, impacting confidentiality, integrity, availability. More info....

item.title: Apache - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 9.8
item.description: Thursday 18 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | Apache DolphinScheduler schedules and manages workflows; its DataSource API lacks authorisation, risking metadata disclosure.

item.title: RedHat - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - Multiple
item.description: Wednesday 17 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - Multiple | A critical Red Hat kernel update for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.4 addresses multiple vulnerabilities, including denial-of-service, memory corruption, and use-after-free issues.

item.title: Rockwell - OT - CVSS Score v3 - 8.7-8.8
item.description: Wednesday 17 June 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v3 - 8.7-8.8 | Two vulnerabilities in Rockwell Automation FLEX I/O EtherNet/IP adapters: a denial-of-service flaw and a critical authentication bypass that could enable unauthorized access and account takeover.

item.title: IBM - Patch - CVSS Score: v4 - Multiple
item.description: Wednesday 17 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v4 - Multiple | IBM Cloud Pak for Data System has critical cryptography flaws that may allow certificate bypass and memory corruption leading to unauthorized access or service disruption.

item.title: Fortra - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 9.8
item.description: Tuesday 16 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | Fortra Core Privileged Access Manager controls privileged access; OS command injection in boks_autoregisterd allows remote code execution with service privileges.

item.title: Zyxel - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.8
item.description: Tuesday 16 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Zyxel GS1900-24EP network switch; stack-based buffer overflow in CGI allows unauthenticated LAN attacker to execute OS commands via HTTP request.

item.title: Wertheim - Patch - CVSS Score: v4 - 8.6
item.description: Tuesday 16 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v4 - 8.6 | Wertheim SafeController 5400 secures vault rooms; lacks cryptographic RS-485 protection, allowing replay attacks to spoof and disable alarms.

item.title: IBM - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - Multiple
item.description: Tuesday 16 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - Multiple | Multiple Axios flaws in IBM Planning Analytics enable data tampering, SSRF, DoS, and security bypass. More info.... The Vulnerability Definitions Explained

item.title: MISP - Security - CVSS Score v4 - 8.8
item.description: Monday 15 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.8 | MISP threat intelligence platform: Authenticated users could exploit mass assignment flaws to alter ownership, modify events, or access sensitive data.

item.title: Google - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.4
item.description: Monday 15 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.4 | Google MCP Toolbox for Databases manages database models; versions lacked origin validation, risking DNS rebinding; new flags improve security.

item.title: Nuxt - Patch - CVSS Score: v4 - 8.8
item.description: Monday 15 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v4 - 8.8 | Nuxt is a Vue.js web framework. Nuxt has route-rule middleware bypass via case-sensitivity mismatch.

item.title: Netty - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.7
item.description: Monday 15 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.7 | Netty network framework for protocol servers and clients; DnsResolveContext fails to validate CNAME origin in DNS responses. More info.... The Vulnerability Definitions Explained

item.title: CyberArk - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 9.1
item.description: Friday 12 June 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | CyberArk Conjur Cloud manages secrets and access; versions allow remote attackers to bypass identity checks and steal access tokens.

item.title: Ubiquiti - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.1-9.9
item.description: Friday 12 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1-9.9 | UID Enterprise Agent identity agent; low‑privilege user can run commands on host. UniFi OS; flaws allow sensitive file read, privilege escalation, and command injection.

item.title: Google - Patch - CVSS Score: v4 - 9.4
item.description: Friday 12 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score: v4 - 9.4 | Google Cloud Dialogflow CX manages conversational AI; a missing authorization flaw in playbook import lets users escalate privileges and control projects.

item.title: IBM - Patch - CVSS Score 9.1-10.
item.description: Friday 12 June 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score 9.1-10. | IBM i OS for enterprise systems; unqualified library call allows user-controlled code to run with administrator privileges, risking escalation. More info.... The Vulnerability Definitions Explained Definitions - Severity GUARDED This alert state represents the return towards normalisation of an alert state, indicating that there was a higher alert state due to a product vulnerability during the previous few days. INCREASED This alert state indicates that a product vulnerability has been identified within the last few days. The vulnerability is either difficult to exploit, or if exploited, results in reduced impact to the target system. This alert state indicates a more serious vulnerability which is exploitable. CRITICAL This alert state indicates a significant threat to the product, where exploits exist or where the vulnerability is potentially devastating.

item.title: Definitions - Type - Monthly - N/A
item.description: Friday 12 June 2026 | Monthly | N/A | Vendors of cyber security products should know better and given their importance they are highlighted when vulnerable, often combined with critival severity +24hrs This bottom descriptor is used with Indicates an alert state which has been present for more than 24 hours. This bottom descriptor indicates that patches are available for vulnerabilities, whether it is the initial report or a patch of a vulnerability that had been previously reported. This bottom descriptor indicates that an Exploit has been made public for a vulnerability, whether it is the initial report or an indication of an exploit for a vulnerability that had been previously reported. This bottom descriptor indicates that the vulnerable product is Operational Technology (OT) such as an Industrial Control System (ICS). OT is not to be confused with Information Technology (IT) This bottom descriptor indicates that a vulnerability has been announced without the opportunity for the vendor to patch it before the details are made known. Whilst vulnerabilities reported are remotely exploitable, there are rare occasions when we will report on a vulnerability with a locally exploitable attack vector (AV:L) Several vendors release multiple patches on or around the same day each month. The severity level will reflect the highest vulnerability © Computer Network Defence Limited 2026 Privacy Notice Terms & Conditions Send us a Message
